PowerShell($tmp = "$env:TEMP\\geonames"; New-Item -ItemType Directory -Force $tmp | Out-Null; Invoke-WebRequest "https://download.geonames.org/export/dump/cities15000.zip" -OutFile "$tmp\\c.zip"; Expand-Archive "$tmp\\c.zip" -DestinationPath $tmp -Force; $f = "$tmp\\cities15000.txt"; "Total lines: " + \(Get-Content $f | Measure-Object -Line\).Lines; "Size MB: " + [math]::Round\(\(Get-Item $f\).Length/1MB,2\))
Bash(git commit -q -m 'Cities mode: recognize ~1000 real cities per country \(GeoNames\), keep answers to well-known cities; add attribution *)
Bash(git commit -q -m 'iOS: lift input above keyboard via visualViewport; confirm before leaving a game in progress *)
